permissions_select.name: permissions_select
permissions_select.using: org_id is null or org_id in (select * from auth.user_org_ids())

task_dependencies_isolation.name: task_dependencies_isolation
task_dependencies_isolation.using:
exists (
    select 1 from tasks t
    where t.id = task_dependencies.task_id
      and t.org_id in (select * from auth.user_org_ids())
  )
  and exists (
    select 1 from tasks t
    where t.id = task_dependencies.depends_on_task_id
      and t.org_id in (select * from auth.user_org_ids())
  )
task_dependencies_isolation.withCheck:
exists (
    select 1 from tasks t
    where t.id = task_dependencies.task_id
      and t.org_id in (select * from auth.user_org_ids())
  )
  and exists (
    select 1 from tasks t
    where t.id = task_dependencies.depends_on_task_id
      and t.org_id in (select * from auth.user_org_ids())
  )

templates_select.name: templates_select
templates_select.using: org_id is null or org_id in (select * from auth.user_org_ids())
